name: @maraventano/map
description: MAP (Maraventano Agent Protocol): a subtractive MCP server for agent commerce — read (find any merchant: decode any product URL into one CleanRead), pay (use the wallet you already have), and publish (be found: serve your own catalog). Teacher, not butler — it reads, explains, persists, and serves; it never signs, pays, or holds keys.
author: Lisa Maraventano, with Claude
